title: Garden Season Setup Flow
description: Step-by-step flow for starting a garden season: assess site and beds, plan crops around household needs, schedule planting and maintenance sessions, and connect harvests to storehouse and preservation.
objectives: Assess garden space, soil condition, and available beds/containers.
Align garden plans with storehouse gaps, feast plans, and health goals.
Create a realistic planting calendar and seed-starting schedule.
Prepare irrigation, tools, and paths to reduce friction once the season starts.
Connect harvest logging to storehouse inventory, preservation, and meal planning.

entryCriteria.description: When to consider activating this garden season setup flow.

exitCriteria.description: When garden season setup is considered complete for this cycle.

nowCtaBehavior.description: How the 'Now' button should behave when this flow is active.

vision_and_constraints.label: Vision & Constraints
vision_and_constraints.goal: Clarify goals for the garden season, including what to grow and why, based on household needs and limits.

steps.label: Define Household Garden Goals
steps.description: Capture your main reasons for gardening this season: food security, specific crops, children’s learning, herbs, or flowers.
steps.nowCtaHint: If goals aren’t defined, suggest this first so later decisions stay grounded.

steps.label: Set Garden Constraints
steps.description: Document time, budget, water access, sunlight, and physical limitations that shape what’s realistic.
steps.nowCtaHint: Helps keep the plan doable instead of overwhelming.

steps.label: Review Storehouse Gaps & Targets
steps.description: Identify which foods you want the garden to supply or supplement, based on storehouse gaps and health goals.
steps.nowCtaHint: Aligns garden plans with actual household needs, not just seed catalogs.

bed_mapping_and_soil_prep.label: Bed Mapping & Soil Prep
bed_mapping_and_soil_prep.goal: Understand the physical layout, map beds/containers, and plan soil improvements before planting.

steps.label: Map Garden Beds & Containers
steps.description: Record each bed, container, or row: size, sun exposure, and access so planning tools can place crops accurately.
steps.nowCtaHint: Essential early step; unlocks location-aware planning.

steps.label: Assess Soil Condition
steps.description: Capture soil type, drainage, and any test results (pH, organic matter) for each main zone.
steps.nowCtaHint: Suggested after mapping beds; informs crop choices and amendments.

steps.label: Plan Soil Amendments & Compost
steps.description: Decide which beds need compost, manure, cover crops, or mineral amendments, and in what order.
steps.nowCtaHint: Helps schedule amendment sessions before planting windows open.

steps.label: Run Soil Prep Session
steps.description: Use a guided work session to clear debris, spread compost/amendments, and shape beds.
steps.nowCtaHint: On a clear-weather day, this should be a top 'Now' option.

steps.label: Clear Paths & Organize Tools
steps.description: Run a short cleaning/organization session for garden paths, gates, and tool areas.
steps.nowCtaHint: Keeps future garden work sessions smoother and safer.

steps.label: Plan Animal-Based Fertility Inputs
steps.description: If you keep animals, decide how and when to use manure or bedding safely for soil fertility.
steps.nowCtaHint: Connects animal care routines to garden health while respecting safety intervals.

crop_planning_and_calendar.label: Crop Planning & Calendar
crop_planning_and_calendar.goal: Choose crops, varieties, and placements; then generate a planting and succession calendar.

steps.label: Select Crops & Varieties
steps.description: Pick which crops and varieties to grow based on taste, storage, preservation, and health priorities.
steps.nowCtaHint: Appears once goals, constraints, and storehouse gaps are known.

steps.label: Create Garden Layout Plan
steps.description: Place crops into specific beds/containers with spacing, companion planting, and rotation in mind.
steps.nowCtaHint: Unlocks location-aware planting sessions later.

steps.label: Generate Planting & Succession Calendar
steps.description: Turn frost dates and crop preferences into a schedule for seed starting, transplanting, and direct sowing.
steps.nowCtaHint: Critical step; drives which planting sessions the 'Now' button surfaces.

steps.label: Set Harvest & Preservation Targets
steps.description: Decide which crops are for fresh eating, which for preservation, and rough target quantities.
steps.nowCtaHint: Enables better links to preservation and storehouse calculators later.

steps.label: Align Crops with Preservation Plans
steps.description: Match crops and harvest windows to canning, dehydrating, and freezing sessions so you’re ready when abundance hits.
steps.nowCtaHint: Optional but powerful if you rely on preserved foods for off-season eating.

steps.label: Link Garden Crops to Recipes
steps.description: Connect planned crops to favorite recipes and cooking sessions so harvest suggestions are practical.
steps.nowCtaHint: Helps the app suggest ways to use garden produce rather than letting it languish.

seed_starting_and_early_tasks.label: Seed Starting & Early Tasks
seed_starting_and_early_tasks.goal: Guide initial hands-on work: seed starting, early direct sowing, irrigation checks, and protection.

steps.label: Set Up Seed Starting Area
steps.description: Prepare shelves, trays, labels, and lights (if used) for indoor or sheltered seed starting.
steps.nowCtaHint: Suggested before the first seed-starting date in the planting calendar.

steps.label: Run Seed Starting Session
steps.description: Follow a guided session to start seeds according to the calendar and layout plan.
steps.nowCtaHint: On seed-start dates, this should be a top 'Now' option.

steps.label: Run Early Direct-Sow Session
steps.description: Use a guided work session for hardy crops that can be sown directly once soil is workable.
steps.nowCtaHint: Shown when weather and soil conditions meet early sowing rules.

steps.label: Check Irrigation & Mulch
steps.description: Walk beds and verify hoses, drip lines, watering cans, and mulch are ready or noted for improvement.
steps.nowCtaHint: Good 'Now' option when you have a small time window and fair weather.

steps.label: Cleanup Potting & Work Areas
steps.description: Use a brief cleaning session to keep potting benches, greenhouses, or porches tidy and pleasant.
steps.nowCtaHint: Useful after messy seed-starting or potting sessions.

season_maintenance_and_harvest_link.label: Season Maintenance & Harvest Link
season_maintenance_and_harvest_link.goal: Establish maintenance loops and connect harvest logging to storehouse, preservation, and cooking sessions.

steps.label: Schedule Recurring Garden Work Sessions
steps.description: Create recurring sessions for weeding, watering, staking, and pest checks across the season.
steps.nowCtaHint: Transforms random garden chores into predictable sessions.

steps.label: Configure Harvest Logging & Sync
steps.description: Ensure harvest logging automatically updates storehouse inventory and triggers preservation suggestions.
steps.nowCtaHint: One-time or occasional setup; increases automation across the season.

steps.label: Run Harvest Intake Session
steps.description: Use a guided intake session to weigh or count harvested items and add them to the storehouse.
steps.nowCtaHint: Suggested on heavy harvest days so nothing gets lost or forgotten.

steps.label: Run Harvest Preservation Session
steps.description: Launch canning, freezing, or dehydrating sessions when harvest volume or spoilage risk is high.
steps.nowCtaHint: Top 'Now' candidate when the system detects high harvest backlog.

steps.label: Suggest Recipes for Fresh Harvest
steps.description: Open a panel or session showing recipes and batch cooking options using today’s harvest.
steps.nowCtaHint: Great follow-up after harvest intake for same-day or next-day meals.

steps.label: Capture Season Notes & Lessons
steps.description: At the end of the season, record what grew well, what failed, and what to adjust next year.
steps.nowCtaHint: Helps each new season setup become smarter than the last.
